name: fix-non-contiguous-tensor-stride-access
description: Fix tensor operations that use flat index offset instead of stride-based multi-dimensional indexing for non-contiguous views. Use when: (1) a tensor copy/conversion silently produces wrong values for transposed or sliced views, (2) element access uses i*dtype_size offset rather than strides, (3) as_contiguous or similar functions assume stride-1 layout.
